REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (19 Park Manor Dr, Daly Cty, Ca 94015)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Petitioner.

Ms. Alavi reported that the petition sought to confirm the sale of a 100% interest in the real property located at 19 Park Manor Drive, Daly City, California, pursuant to the terms and condidions of the Report of Sale dated October 26, 2015. She stated the property was being sold "as-is", for a purchase price of $695,000.00. She requested that the original terms of sale be modified to allow a 40 day closing, rather that the 30 day closing period stated in the petition. There were no overbidders, and the Court confirmed the sale of the 100% interest in the real property located at 19 Park Manor Drive, Daly City, California, pursuant to the terms and condidions of the Report of Sale dated October 26, 2015 on an as-is basis for $695,000.00, with 2/3 of the sales proceeds to go to the Estate of Seda Boghossian, and 1/3 to the Elina Yeramian Trust. No bond was required for the Estate of Seda Boghossian, and bond of $221,000.00 was required for the Elina Yeramian Trust
(orders signed).
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.
